{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Aesthetics Nurse",
  "description": "Invealth Partners Limited is an Investment and Management company with a focus on creating investment opportunities and strategic partnerships in the African continent. The company is poised to create efficiency and viability in the Infrastructure, healthcare, energy, retail and commodity sector while attracting investment and management of this portfolio to ensure sustainable growth and directly impact on service delivery across targeted ecosystems.&nbsp; Invealths strategy is one that takes advantage of the need for entry into the African opportunity marmet and developes strategies, models and vehicles that are familiar to investors especially financial management and value growth over an acceptable period. Our company and processes are designed to give investor confidence, and we have a due diligence process that ensures that we only partner in the value based solutions.

Invealth Partners serve to create a link between business opportunities and investors, either private or institutional, with a mid to long-term overview. Our business focus is guided by a strong Environment, Social and Government partnership justification. Africa is the next investment destination&hellip;Invealth provides the strategic partnership that provides holistic value.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Aesthetics Nurse

Job Location: Abuja

Job Description
Patient Assessment:


	Conduct comprehensive patient assessments, including medical history and evaluations.
	Assess suitability for aesthetic procedures and recognize contraindications.
	Document patient information accurately in medical records.
	Obtain informed consent before procedures.


Performing Aesthetic Procedures:


	Depending on the hospital&rsquo;s policies, physician supervision requirements, and licensing regulations, responsibilities may include:
	Administering injectable treatments such as botulinum toxin and dermal fillers where permitted.
	Performing chemical peels.
	Conducting micro needling procedures.
	Assisting with laser treatments and other energy-based procedures.
	Performing skin rejuvenation treatments.
	Administering platelet-rich plasma (PRP) treatments where authorized.
	Providing body contouring and non-invasive cosmetic procedures.
	Managing wound care for cosmetic and reconstructive surgery patients.
	Assisting Physicians and Surgeons:
	Assist dermatologists, plastic surgeons, and cosmetic physicians during procedures.
	Prepare treatment rooms and required equipment.
	Monitor patients before, during, and after procedures.
	Ensure sterile technique and infection prevention standards.
	Provide post-procedure support and care.
	Patient Education and Counseling:
	Explain treatment options, risks, benefits, and expected outcomes.
	Educate patients on pre-treatment and post-treatment care.
	Provide skincare recommendations and maintenance plans.
	Counsel patients regarding realistic expectations.
	Address patient questions and concerns professionally.


Post-Procedure Care:


	Monitor patient recovery and treatment outcomes.
	Scheduled body massages after aesthetic procedure.
	Identify and manage minor complications within scope of practice.
	Escalate concerns requiring physician intervention.
	Schedule follow-up appointments and evaluations.
	Maintain continuity of care throughout the treatment journey.


Medication and Product Management:


	Prepare and administer prescribed medications.
	Maintain inventory of aesthetic products and supplies.
	Ensure proper storage and handling of medications and injectable.
	Monitor expiration dates and stock levels.
	Maintain accurate records of product usage.


Infection Prevention and Safety:


	Follow hospital infection-control policies.
	Maintain aseptic and sterile procedures.
	Ensure safe operation of laser and aesthetic equipment.
	Monitor compliance with safety regulations.
	Report adverse events and complications appropriately.


Documentation and Record Keeping:


	Maintain accurate patient records and treatment notes.
	Document assessments, procedures, outcomes, and follow-up plans.
	Record consent forms and treatment photographs when applicable.
	Ensure compliance with privacy and confidentiality regulations.


Quality Improvement and Professional Development:


	Participate in quality assurance activities.
	Stay updated on new aesthetic treatments and technologies.
	Attend training programs, workshops, and continuing education courses.
	Assist in developing treatment protocols and patient care standards.


&nbsp;Requirements


	Bachelor of Science in Nursing (BSN), Registered Nursing (RN), or equivalent nursing qualification.
	Minimum of 3 years experience working in dermatology, plastic surgery, cosmetic medicine, or aesthetic nursing.
	Additional certification or training in aesthetic medicine, cosmetic nursing, dermatology nursing, or plastic surgery nursing preferred.
	Current and valid Registered Nurse (RN) license with the relevant nursing regulatory authority.
	Hospital clinical experience required.
	Experience with cosmetic procedures and patient consultations is advantageous.


Clinical Skills:


	Patient assessment and clinical evaluation.
	Injection techniques (where permitted).
	Wound management and postoperative care.
	Knowledge of skin anatomy and physiology.
	Infection prevention and control.
	Emergency response and patient monitoring.


Technical Skills:


	Operation of laser and aesthetic equipment.
	Electronic medical record documentation.
	Photography documentation for treatment outcomes.
	Product and inventory management.


Soft Skills:


	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
	Strong customer service orientation.
	Attention to detail and precision.
	Empathy and professionalism.
	Ability to manage sensitive patient concerns.
	Time management and organizational skills.


Benefits


	Health Cover
	Paid Leave
	Career Development Opportunities
",
  "datePosted": "2026-06-16",
  "validThrough": "2026-07-17",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Invealth Partners Limited"
    
  },

Aesthetics Nurse Job at Invealth Partners Limited




        
    

        
        
     

            
    

Invealth Partners Limited is an Investment and Management company with a focus on creating investment opportunities and strategic partnerships in the African continent. The company is poised to create efficiency and viability in the Infrastructure, healthcare, energy, retail and commodity sector while attracting investment and management of this portfolio to ensure sustainable growth and directly impact on service delivery across targeted ecosystems.  Invealths strategy is one that takes advantage of the need for entry into the African opportunity marmet and developes strategies, models and vehicles that are familiar to investors especially financial management and value growth over an acceptable period. Our company and processes are designed to give investor confidence, and we have a due diligence process that ensures that we only partner in the value based solutions.

Invealth Partners serve to create a link between business opportunities and investors, either private or institutional, with a mid to long-term overview. Our business focus is guided by a strong Environment, Social and Government partnership justification. Africa is the next investment destination…Invealth provides the strategic partnership that provides holistic value.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Aesthetics Nurse

Job Location: Abuja

Job Description
Patient Assessment:


	Conduct comprehensive patient assessments, including medical history and evaluations.
	Assess suitability for aesthetic procedures and recognize contraindications.
	Document patient information accurately in medical records.
	Obtain informed consent before procedures.


Performing Aesthetic Procedures:


	Depending on the hospital’s policies, physician supervision requirements, and licensing regulations, responsibilities may include:
	Administering injectable treatments such as botulinum toxin and dermal fillers where permitted.
	Performing chemical peels.
	Conducting micro needling procedures.
	Assisting with laser treatments and other energy-based procedures.
	Performing skin rejuvenation treatments.
	Administering platelet-rich plasma (PRP) treatments where authorized.
	Providing body contouring and non-invasive cosmetic procedures.
	Managing wound care for cosmetic and reconstructive surgery patients.
	Assisting Physicians and Surgeons:
	Assist dermatologists, plastic surgeons, and cosmetic physicians during procedures.
	Prepare treatment rooms and required equipment.
	Monitor patients before, during, and after procedures.
	Ensure sterile technique and infection prevention standards.
	Provide post-procedure support and care.
	Patient Education and Counseling:
	Explain treatment options, risks, benefits, and expected outcomes.
	Educate patients on pre-treatment and post-treatment care.
	Provide skincare recommendations and maintenance plans.
	Counsel patients regarding realistic expectations.
	Address patient questions and concerns professionally.


Post-Procedure Care:


	Monitor patient recovery and treatment outcomes.
	Scheduled body massages after aesthetic procedure.
	Identify and manage minor complications within scope of practice.
	Escalate concerns requiring physician intervention.
	Schedule follow-up appointments and evaluations.
	Maintain continuity of care throughout the treatment journey.


Medication and Product Management:


	Prepare and administer prescribed medications.
	Maintain inventory of aesthetic products and supplies.
	Ensure proper storage and handling of medications and injectable.
	Monitor expiration dates and stock levels.
	Maintain accurate records of product usage.


Infection Prevention and Safety:


	Follow hospital infection-control policies.
	Maintain aseptic and sterile procedures.
	Ensure safe operation of laser and aesthetic equipment.
	Monitor compliance with safety regulations.
	Report adverse events and complications appropriately.


Documentation and Record Keeping:


	Maintain accurate patient records and treatment notes.
	Document assessments, procedures, outcomes, and follow-up plans.
	Record consent forms and treatment photographs when applicable.
	Ensure compliance with privacy and confidentiality regulations.


Quality Improvement and Professional Development:


	Participate in quality assurance activities.
	Stay updated on new aesthetic treatments and technologies.
	Attend training programs, workshops, and continuing education courses.
	Assist in developing treatment protocols and patient care standards.


 Requirements


	Bachelor of Science in Nursing (BSN), Registered Nursing (RN), or equivalent nursing qualification.
	Minimum of 3 years experience working in dermatology, plastic surgery, cosmetic medicine, or aesthetic nursing.
	Additional certification or training in aesthetic medicine, cosmetic nursing, dermatology nursing, or plastic surgery nursing preferred.
	Current and valid Registered Nurse (RN) license with the relevant nursing regulatory authority.
	Hospital clinical experience required.
	Experience with cosmetic procedures and patient consultations is advantageous.


Clinical Skills:


	Patient assessment and clinical evaluation.
	Injection techniques (where permitted).
	Wound management and postoperative care.
	Knowledge of skin anatomy and physiology.
	Infection prevention and control.
	Emergency response and patient monitoring.


Technical Skills:


	Operation of laser and aesthetic equipment.
	Electronic medical record documentation.
	Photography documentation for treatment outcomes.
	Product and inventory management.


Soft Skills:


	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
	Strong customer service orientation.
	Attention to detail and precision.
	Empathy and professionalism.
	Ability to manage sensitive patient concerns.
	Time management and organizational skills.


Benefits


	Health Cover
	Paid Leave
	Career Development    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "title": "Customer Service Executive",
  "description": "International Workplace Group (IWG) is the largest provider of flexible workspace solutions in the world. Trading under a number of brands (including Regus, Spaces, HQ, Signature and No18) we have a physical network of over 3,000 locations across 1,000 towns and cities in 120 countries. Our mission is to help our millions of customers to have a great day at work, every day.

COVID-19 forced an unprecedented experiment in flexible working, which is now driving a surge in demand for our flexible workspace solutions. To meet this demand, we are rapidly accelerating the growth of our global network. To deliver our ambition we are recruiting partners to open and operate IWG locations. Our target audience are building owners, franchise operators and competitors, we will work with our partners under a variety of commercial structures demanding a dynamic and broad-based approach to business development.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Service Executive

Job ID: 51581
Job Location: Lagos

Job&nbsp; Description


	This position sits at the heart of our growing global organisation and is a critical role where you will have an opportunity to shine and deliver world-class customer service. You will be part of a dynamic team with amazing career opportunities, working regular and sociable hours and with the chance to unleash your full potential.


We will expect you to:


	Give our customers and their guests a warm and friendly welcome, every day.
	Manage a range of on-site tasks to help our busy workspace run smoothly and happily.
	Above all, help your customers and colleagues have a great day at work.


About you
What really matters is that you&rsquo;ve got the right mindset. We&rsquo;ll provide everything else for you to build a fantastic career with IWG. All you need to bring is:


	Great communication skills and a love of interacting with people.
	A positive, outgoing and can-do attitude.
	The ability to take direction, learn new skills and apply them with confidence.
	The motivation to be your best every day &ndash; and the determination to be even better tomorrow.

Customer Service Executive Job at International Workplace Group (IWG)




        
    

        
        International Workplace Group (IWG) is the largest provider of flexible workspace solutions in the world. Trading under a number of brands (including Regus, Spaces, HQ, Signature and No18) we have a physical network of over 3,000 locations across 1,000 towns and cities in 120 countries. Our mission is to help our millions of customers to have a great day at work, every day.
     

            
    



COVID-19 forced an unprecedented experiment in flexible working, which is now driving a surge in demand for our flexible workspace solutions. To meet this demand, we are rapidly accelerating the growth of our global network. To deliver our ambition we are recruiting partners to open and operate IWG locations. Our target audience are building owners, franchise operators and competitors, we will work with our partners under a variety of commercial structures demanding a dynamic and broad-based approach to business development.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Service Executive

Job ID: 51581
Job Location: Lagos

Job  Description


	This position sits at the heart of our growing global organisation and is a critical role where you will have an opportunity to shine and deliver world-class customer service. You will be part of a dynamic team with amazing career opportunities, working regular and sociable hours and with the chance to unleash your full potential.


We will expect you to:


	Give our customers and their guests a warm and friendly welcome, every day.
	Manage a range of on-site tasks to help our busy workspace run smoothly and happily.
	Above all, help your customers and colleagues have a great day at work.


About you
What really matters is that you’ve got the right mindset. We’ll provide everything else for you to build a fantastic career with IWG. All you need to bring is:


	Great communication skills and a love of interacting with people.
	A positive, outgoing and can-do attitude.
	The ability to take direction, learn new skills and apply them with confidence.
	The motivation to be your best every day – and the determination to be even better tomorrow.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

        Agiville Industries Limited is a manufacturing company based in Mile 2, Lagos involved in the mass production of high quality plastic environmental waste bins for domestic, commercial and industrial use.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Account Assistant

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Requirements


	Must be a graduate of Accounting
	Good knowledge of Excel.


Salary
N100,000 per month.
     

            
    



Method of Application

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Customer Service Officer",
  "description": "Elvaridah Limited - Our client, a growing fragrance and beauty brand, is recruiting suitable candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Service Officer

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Fragrance &amp; Beauty Retail

About the Role


	Our client, a growing fragrance and beauty brand, is seeking a professional and customer-oriented Customer Service Officer to deliver exceptional customer experiences across all touchpoints.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for managing customer inquiries, resolving complaints, processing orders, and ensuring customers receive a seamless and personalized shopping experience both online and in-store.


Duties and Responsibilities
Customer Support &amp; Engagement:


	Serve as the primary point of contact for customer inquiries via phone, email, social media, WhatsApp, and in-store interactions.
	Provide accurate information regarding fragrances, products, promotions, pricing, and order status.
	Deliver a warm, professional, and personalized customer experience.
	Build strong relationships with customers to encourage repeat business and brand loyalty.


Order Management:


	Process customer orders accurately and efficiently.
	Track and monitor orders from purchase to delivery.
	Coordinate with logistics and operations teams to ensure timely order fulfillment.
	Assist customers with product exchanges, returns, and refunds in line with company policies.


Complaint Resolution:


	Address customer complaints and concerns promptly and professionally.
	Investigate issues and provide appropriate solutions within established timelines.
	Escalate unresolved matters to management when necessary.
	Follow up with customers to ensure satisfaction after resolution.


Customer Experience &amp; Retention:


	Proactively engage customers to enhance their shopping experience.
	Collect customer feedback and provide recommendations for service improvement.
	Support customer retention initiatives and loyalty programs.
	Identify opportunities to upsell or cross-sell products based on customer preferences.


Administrative &amp; Reporting Duties:


	Maintain accurate records of customer interactions, complaints, and resolutions.
	Update customer databases and CRM systems.
	Prepare periodic reports on customer inquiries, feedback, and service performance.
	Assist with inventory inquiries and product availability updates.


Brand Representation:


	Uphold the brand&#39;s image and values in all customer interactions.
	Maintain extensive knowledge of fragrance collections, product notes, ingredients, and brand offerings.
	Assist in promoting new product launches, campaigns, and special offers.


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)


	Customer satisfaction ratings.
	Customer response and resolution time.
	Customer retention and repeat purchase rates.
	Accuracy in order processing and customer records.
	Number of customer issues resolved successfully.
	Positive customer feedback and reviews.


Requirements
Education:


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree or HND in Business Administration, Mass Communication, Marketing, Customer Service Management, or a related field.


Experience:


	2&ndash;3 years of experience in customer service, customer support, retail sales, or client relationship management.
	Previous experience in the beauty, fragrance, cosmetics, fashion, luxury retail, or lifestyle industry is highly preferred.
	Experience managing online customer inquiries and e-commerce orders is an advantage.


Skills &amp; Competencies:


	Excellent verbal and written communication skills.
	Strong interpersonal and customer relationship management abilities.
	Passion for beauty, fragrances, and luxury customer experiences.
	Ability to handle customer complaints with professionalism and empathy.
	Strong organizational and multitasking skills.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite and CRM systems.
	Attention to detail and problem-solving abilities.
	Ability to work independently and as part of a team.


Compensation


	Competitive salary.
	Performance-based incentives.
	Staff discounts on products.
	Opportunities for training and career growth.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Applications to: careers@elvaridah.com using &quot;Customer Service Officer&quot; as the subject of the mail.",
  "datePosted": "2026-06-16",
  "validThrough": "2026-07-17",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Elvaridah"
    
  },
  "jobLocation": {
    "@type": "Place",
    "address": {
      "@type": "PostalAddress",
       "postalCode": ". ",
       "addressRegion": ". ",

      "addressCountry": "NG"

      "maxValue": 0,

    }

}



Customer Service Officer Job at Elvaridah Limited




        
    

        
        Elvaridah Limited - Our client, a growing fragrance and beauty brand, is recruiting suitable candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Service Officer

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Fragrance & Beauty Retail

About the Role
     

            
    




	Our client, a growing fragrance and beauty brand, is seeking a professional and customer-oriented Customer Service Officer to deliver exceptional customer experiences across all touchpoints.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for managing customer inquiries, resolving complaints, processing orders, and ensuring customers receive a seamless and personalized shopping experience both online and in-store.


Duties and Responsibilities
Customer Support & Engagement:


	Serve as the primary point of contact for customer inquiries via phone, email, social media, WhatsApp, and in-store interactions.
	Provide accurate information regarding fragrances, products, promotions, pricing, and order status.
	Deliver a warm, professional, and personalized customer experience.
	Build strong relationships with customers to encourage repeat business and brand loyalty.


Order Management:


	Process customer orders accurately and efficiently.
	Track and monitor orders from purchase to delivery.
	Coordinate with logistics and operations teams to ensure timely order fulfillment.
	Assist customers with product exchanges, returns, and refunds in line with company policies.


Complaint Resolution:


	Address customer complaints and concerns promptly and professionally.
	Investigate issues and provide appropriate solutions within established timelines.
	Escalate unresolved matters to management when necessary.
	Follow up with customers to ensure satisfaction after resolution.


Customer Experience & Retention:


	Proactively engage customers to enhance their shopping experience.
	Collect customer feedback and provide recommendations for service improvement.
	Support customer retention initiatives and loyalty programs.
	Identify opportunities to upsell or cross-sell products based on customer preferences.


Administrative & Reporting Duties:


	Maintain accurate records of customer interactions, complaints, and resolutions.
	Update customer databases and CRM systems.
	Prepare periodic reports on customer inquiries, feedback, and service performance.
	Assist with inventory inquiries and product availability updates.


Brand Representation:


	Uphold the brand's image and values in all customer interactions.
	Maintain extensive knowledge of fragrance collections, product notes, ingredients, and brand offerings.
	Assist in promoting new product launches, campaigns, and special offers.


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)


	Customer satisfaction ratings.
	Customer response and resolution time.
	Customer retention and repeat purchase rates.
	Accuracy in order processing and customer records.
	Number of customer issues resolved successfully.
	Positive customer feedback and reviews.


Requirements
Education:


	Bachelor's Degree or HND in Business Administration, Mass Communication, Marketing, Customer Service Management, or a related field.


Experience:


	2–3 years of experience in customer service, customer support, retail sales, or client relationship management.
	Previous experience in the beauty, fragrance, cosmetics, fashion, luxury retail, or lifestyle industry is highly preferred.
	Experience managing online customer inquiries and e-commerce orders is an advantage.


Skills & Competencies:


	Excellent verbal and written communication skills.
	Strong interpersonal and customer relationship management abilities.
	Passion for beauty, fragrances, and luxury customer experiences.
	Ability to handle customer complaints with professionalism and empathy.
	Strong organizational and multitasking skills.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite and CRM systems.
	Attention to detail and problem-solving abilities.
	Ability to work independently and as part of a team.


Compensation


	Competitive salary.
	Performance-based incentives.
	Staff discounts on products.
	Opportunities for training and career growth.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Applications to: [email protected] using "Customer Service Officer" as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Procurement Officer (NYSC) Job at South Shore Women’s and Children’s Hospital




        
    

        
        South Shore Women’s and Children’s Hospital is a specialist health care facility located in Lagos, Nigeria at 6b Goriola street, off Adeola Odeku Street VI. The hospital is dedicated to the provision of exceptional patient centred medical care to our clients, based on current international best practices. Our team consists of professionals who have been well trained in South Shore’s culture of excellence, efficiency, and empathy, to ensure that every patient receives safe, seamless care within our warm and friendly environment.

We are also a referral centre for minimally invasive gynaecological surgeries, and we have performed over one thousand endoscopic surgeries in the last five years, with no recorded mortalities.
     

            
    



We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Procurement Officer (NYSC)

Job Location: Lagos

Requirements


	Candidates should possess relevant qualifications and experience.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply
